settings.label: Custom CSS
settings.description: Add custom CSS styles applied only to this gallery or album.

settings.label: CSS Code
settings.hint:
Use SELECTOR to target this {postType} wrapper - e.g. SELECTOR.fg-item { border: 2px solid red; }.
All rules are automatically scoped so they only affect this {postType}.
Harmful constructs such as break-outs, @import, and expression() are blocked before output.

settings.label: Custom JavaScript
settings.description: Add JavaScript that runs after this gallery or album is rendered. Code runs inside an IIFE and cannot affect other galleries on the page.

settings.label: JavaScript Code
settings.hint:
Use collection to reference this {postType} element, or COLLECTION_ID to get its ID string - e.g. collection.addEventListener('click', handler);.
break-outs and bare HTML tags are always blocked.
eval, Function constructor, and string-based timers are blocked by default and require a security setting to enable.
